nodes.title: Footwear
nodes.summary: Footwear — 62 products grouped under the footwear category.

content.text:
# Footwear

Subtree fanout for the footwear category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 62 product children — agents looking for footwear can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.
